title: peniocereus viperinus
intro: Peniocereus viperinus, also known as the snake plant or viper cactus, is a species of cactus native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Peniocereus viperinus include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating wounds, as well as having antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Peniocereus viperinus can be made by infusing the leaves or stems in water, and have been used to make teas, tinctures, and salves to treat various health conditions.
